milestoneTiers.alpha: v0.4.0-alpha prerelease (Creative Director only, Vercel preview)
milestoneTiers.beta: v0.4.0-beta prerelease (internal + invited friends, Vercel preview)
milestoneTiers.final: v0.4.0 release (public-ready single-user, Vercel production, merged to main)

features.description: Scaffold lib/persistence/** typed repository interfaces and lib/supabase/** client+auth plumbing; wire CI invariant so only those two paths import @supabase/*.
steps: Create lib/persistence/** with TaskRepository, CouncilMemoryRepository, SessionRepository, ProposalRepository interfaces
Create lib/supabase/** with createBrowserClient and createServerClient helpers via @supabase/ssr
Add CI rule (eslint-plugin-boundaries or bespoke grep check) blocking @supabase/* imports outside the two paths
Unit-test the boundary rule

features.description: Supabase schema migrations for board + Council memory + sessions + proposals: tasks, council_sessions, council_turns, council_memory_summaries, council_proposals, critic_diffs, memory_recalls, user_preferences.
steps: Write Supabase migration for tasks table (columns from v0.1 card shape)
Write migrations for council_* tables per PRD §11.1
Add RLS policies: user sees only own rows
Seed local dev DB from migration

features.description: Single-user magic-link auth via @supabase/ssr; sign-in page + session refresh middleware + sign-out.
steps: Add /sign-in route with email input + magic-link submission
Add /auth/callback handler for token exchange
Add middleware.ts session refresh via @supabase/ssr
Add sign-out action
Block app routes behind auth; redirect unauthenticated to /sign-in

features.description: v0.4-beta invite allowlist enforcement: block sign-in if email not on hardcoded allowlist in lib/auth/beta-allowlist.ts.
steps: Create lib/auth/beta-allowlist.ts with type-safe string array
In /auth/callback, reject the callback if the authenticated email is not on the list
Surface a calm honest sentence on rejection

features.description: Migrate v0.1 board from localStorage to Supabase tasks table; preserve three-column layout; keep v0.1 task dialog behavior.
steps: Swap localStorage reads for TaskRepository reads
Swap localStorage writes for TaskRepository writes guarded by the Council Write Gate contract (even if Council isn't wired yet, direct user actions still produce a proposalId + approvalToken)
Add loading, success, and error states per global CLAUDE.md
Preserve three-column layout behavior from v0.1

features.description: Apply canonical v0.4 design tokens (colors, typography via next/font, spacing, shadows, motion) to the existing v0.1 Kanban UI; no feature additions from v0.6 scope.
steps: Register Fraunces, IBM Plex Sans, JetBrains Mono via next/font/google
Add --color-*, --space-*, --font-*, --shadow-*, --motion-* tokens to app/globals.css per design-system.md §4-§9
Extend tailwind.config.ts to consume the token namespace
Apply tokens to existing board UI (background, columns, cards, task dialog)
Verify at 375px mobile + 1280px desktop per design-system.md §6.2-§6.3

features.description: Bottom shelf scaffold: collapsible drawer docked to the bottom of the board, respects iPhone SE width, uses --color-surface-shelf and --shadow-* tokens.
steps: Create components/council-shelf/ with ShelfContainer, ShelfHeader, ShelfBody, ShelfToggle
Implement collapse/expand motion per design-system.md §9.3 (300ms, --motion-ease-standard)
Verify sticky-bottom behavior at 375px and shelf-width behavior at 1280px
Render Council turns as direct-on-surface editorial flow (no bubble chrome) per design-system.md §8.3

features.description: Thinking-stream component: muted cursor + token-by-token reveal + variable cadence + 50ms fade per token; applied to every Council reply.
steps: Create components/thinking-stream/ with a React component that consumes a streaming text source
Render a muted cursor in --color-ink-500 during generation
Animate each token opacity 0→1 over ~50ms
Vary inter-token delay in small bursts (no uniform machine-gun reveal)

features.description: Researcher agent: one agent, two sources (public web + internal board/memory); logs tool calls per call; fail-visible.
steps: Create lib/council/researcher/ with Anthropic SDK wiring (server-only)
Implement web tool use (whichever web search path we pick at Phase 10) with per-call rate limiting per PRD §7
Implement memory read path via CouncilMemoryRepository
Persist tool calls + findings into council_turns
Fail-visible: on error, return an honest one-liner to the Consolidator

features.description: Consolidator agent: user-facing voice; drafts responses; streams output; writes turn logs sync and session summaries async.
steps: Create lib/council/consolidator/ with Anthropic SDK streaming wiring
Implement mode classification (Plan/Advise/Chat) from user input + session state
Emit streaming tokens over an SSE or ReadableStream endpoint for F08 consumption
Write turn log synchronously via CouncilMemoryRepository
Schedule session-end summary write to the cold-path queue
Fail-hard: retry once, then surface failure sentence

features.description: Critic agent: risk-threshold dispatch; reviews Consolidator drafts; fail-quiet UI + loud server alert.
steps: Create lib/council/critic/ with Anthropic SDK wiring
Implement risk tagging on Consolidator drafts (low/medium/high per PRD §9.2)
Dispatch Critic only when risk >= threshold (env COUNCIL_CRITIC_RISK_THRESHOLD default 'medium')
Fail-quiet to UI; emit structured-state email via F17 on failure

features.description: Council Write Gate server contract: proposals endpoint issues proposalId; approvals endpoint issues one-time approvalToken; task-mutation route handler rejects payloads missing both.
steps: Create POST /api/council/proposals issuing proposalId and storing to council_proposals
Create POST /api/council/proposals/:id/approve issuing one-time approvalToken (hashed + short TTL)
Add payload-shape guard in task-mutation handlers (reject if missing approval metadata)
Unit test: direct task-mutation without proposalId is rejected
Unit test: expired proposal returns 410

features.description: Proposal card UI + tap-to-approve flow: dashed border, no left-edge priority bar, minimal approval button with moss-tinted confirmation per design-system.md §8.4/§8.6.
steps: Create components/proposal-card/ with dashed border + --shadow-proposal
Render approval button per design-system.md §8.6
On tap: scale(0.98) + moss-tinted flash per §9.3, then post approval, then animate into target column
On expiry: archive visually with a fade + explanation line

features.description: Morning greeting flow: fires on first app-open per calendar day; memory-only (no live web); ≤ 200 chars; renders with thinking-stream.
steps: Detect first-open per calendar day via session state
Assemble greeting prompt with allowed board signals only (todo/in_progress/done counts, overdue, top-1 staleness)
Enforce ≤ 200-char / 2-sentence cap on final rendered text
Route through Consolidator streaming; render with thinking-stream cursor
Fall through to the short re-entry line on subsequent same-day opens

features.description: Chat mode: open conversation; memory-only Researcher; Critic below risk threshold; no proposal cards unless requested.
steps: Route shelf input into Consolidator with mode hint 'chat'
Gate web research behind explicit user request
Respect token budget 10k per turn (enforced in F29)
Write turn logs synchronously

features.description: Plan mode: topic → chip follow-ups → memo + draft tasks → proposal cards; Critic always on; web research enabled with per-session rate limit.
steps: Route shelf input into Consolidator with mode hint 'plan'
Render up to three inline chips for timeline / audience / definition-of-done per design-system.md §8.5
Enable Researcher web path with ≤ 10 calls/session rate limit
Always run Critic on the draft
Surface proposal cards for each draft task in the shelf

features.description: Advise mode: Council reads board + memory, surfaces recommendations, writes nothing unless the user taps; web off by default.
steps: Route shelf input into Consolidator with mode hint 'advise'
Load current board snapshot via TaskRepository
Disable Researcher web path unless user explicitly asks; require confirmation before firing web
On user 'draft this': hand off to Plan mode's proposal-card path

features.description: Session turn logging: sync write of Researcher/Consolidator/Critic turn I/O per PRD §10.2 table; session-end summary writer queued async.
steps: Write to council_turns on each turn lifecycle step
Detect session end (shelf close OR 30-min idle OR sign-out)
Schedule cold-path summary job that writes council_memory_summaries at session end
Increment modes-used histogram on session start

features.description: Read-only Session history list view: columns per PRD §10.3 (timestamp, mode, title, duration, outcome, token cost); no search/filter at alpha/beta.
steps: Add /history route rendering a read-only list view
Paginate by creation date desc
Derive session title from first user turn or Consolidator-picked topic at session end

features.description: Error-email pipeline: Resend-backed, structured payload per PRD §14.1, dedup per-hour per (user × agent × failure_class), env-driven recipient.
steps: Wire Resend via lib/observability/error-email.ts
Define failure_class enum and attach to every caught failure
Implement in-memory dedup window keyed by (user_id, agent, failure_class)
Read recipient from ERROR_EMAIL_RECIPIENT env var
Redact user turn content from stack traces

features.description: Token + latency instrumentation from day one: capture per-call in/out tokens, first-token time, full-reply time, 429 count; emit to Vercel Analytics + custom table for per-agent breakdown.
steps: Wrap Anthropic SDK calls with instrumentation (token counts, timings)
Emit events to Vercel Analytics via the Next.js App Router helper
Persist per-call metrics to a metrics table for per-agent breakdown in F27
Add counters for Anthropic 429, Supabase error, error-email failure

features.description: Token-budget enforcement: soft warning at 80% of session ceiling, hard cut at 100%, per-user daily 500k cap with soft-pause + error-email on first hit.
steps: Track cumulative tokens per session in Consolidator middleware
Emit inline '80% used' warning when threshold crossed
On 100%: return honest one-liner and close the session
Track per-user daily via cached counter backed by metrics table
On 500k/day cap: soft-pause + error-email (first hit per user per day)
Read cap from COUNCIL_TOKEN_CAP_DAILY env

features.description: Critic-diff storage + 'How I got here' reveal: on Critic-changed turn, store diff in critic_diffs table; expandable in the shelf and Session history.
steps: Compute non-whitespace diff between pre-Critic and post-Critic drafts
Persist diff to critic_diffs with turn_id
Render 'How I got here' affordance on every Council turn
On expand: fetch and display Researcher findings + Critic diff + Consolidator changes

features.description: Memory-recall artifact: on Consolidator recalling a prior-session turn, write memory_recalls row AND render inline 'I remember you said X on [date]' line.
steps: Tag Consolidator recalls at synthesis time with source turn_id + snippet
Persist each recall to memory_recalls
Render recall line inline in the Council reply, styled per design-system.md §10 voice rules

features.description: Transparency preferences: A/B/C/D selector at /settings/council; store in user_preferences (default B); UI honors pref on every Council reply (glyphs for C, inline dissent line for D).
steps: Add /settings/council page with four radios + live preview
Persist preference to user_preferences table (default 'B')
Wire preference into the shelf renderer: A suppresses 'How I got here'; C adds [R]/[C] source glyphs; D adds unresolved-dissent line

features.description: Basic /admin/metrics dashboard (v0.4-beta cut): request counts, error rates, p50/p95 latency, 429 count, per-agent token totals.
steps: Create /admin/metrics route gated by role (single-user in v0.4 = the CD)
Render crude tables reading the metrics table from F21
Surface 429 count + Supabase error count + error-email failure count

features.description: Per-agent /admin/metrics breakdown (v0.4 final): Researcher vs Consolidator vs Critic token share, latency histograms, failure rates per agent.
steps: Extend /admin/metrics with per-agent grouping
Add simple histogram rendering (no heavy chart library)
Compute pass/fail against starting SLOs from PRD §13.3 and flag misses

features.description: Full searchable + filterable Session history (v0.4 final): full-text search across turn content; filter by mode, date range, cost range, outcome.
steps: Add Postgres text search index on council_turns.content
Extend /history with search box + filter controls
Paginate with keyset cursor for performance

features.description: User-controlled session-history purge (v0.4 final): user can delete individual sessions or their full history; honors the 'forever by default' retention with an explicit off-switch.
steps: Add per-session delete action in /history
Add 'delete all my history' action in /settings/council with two-step confirm
Cascade deletes through council_turns, council_memory_summaries, critic_diffs, memory_recalls for the user

features.description: Anthropic 429 soft-pause: shelf enters soft-pause state, client-side queue up to 30s, exponential backoff, then per-agent failure policy. Verified under a deliberately throttled tier-1 Anthropic account.
steps: Detect 429 in Anthropic SDK wrapper
Enter soft-pause UI state (shelf shows calm 'I'll try again in a moment')
Implement exponential backoff queue (1s / 2s / 4s / 8s / 16s)
After 30s, fall through to per-agent failure path
Test under throttled Anthropic account and record the session artifact

features.description: First-run onboarding: new user reaches a meaningful Council interaction in under 60 seconds. Stopwatched dry-run with three naïve users during final-release QA.
steps: Design the first-run path: sign-in → greeting → first Plan-mode chip answered
Instrument the path timing
Run three naïve-user stopwatch sessions and capture the results in the release log
Revise + rerun if any user crosses 60s

features.description: Mobile layout sign-off at iPhone SE width (375px): shelf behavior, board column snap-scroll, greeting readability, proposal card tap target per design-system.md §6.2.
steps: Run mobile screenshot capture at 375px across every surface
Verify tap targets meet minimum 44px
Verify shelf does not occlude the active board column
File fixes as individual PRs; sign off when zero open items
